scenario.name: VOS-RS SDES-SRTP caller
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: "1001" <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]srtp[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=caller 1 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=VOS-RS SDES-SRTP c=IN IP4 [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/SAVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:BwcHBwcHBwcHBwcHBwcHBwcHBwcHBwcHBwcHBwcH

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "1001" <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]srtp[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "1001" <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]srtp[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Content-Length: 0
